Daemonurgy is the [[vaccine]] to [[angst]] which involves development of a [[daemon]] which repeats teachings in oneself. Sometimes called "Indwelling the sage". 

As it is a vaccine of [[domicide]] it is collectivistic in nature, and is based on external rather than internal teachings, and sometimes contrasted with [[Counter-Spiralling]] which is a similar system but individualistically applied by a specific person to themselves to avoid their own particular [[maelstroms]] causing them to [[spiral]]

Socratic dialogues are based on the idea of helping [[Indwelling the sage|indwell the sage]]. Cynics in particular [[Antisthenes]] did this and had this interpretation of [[Socrates]] while Platonists tended more towards a [[critical thinking]] approach<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ir7P1omkgqI</ref>

== References ==
[[Category:Angst]]
[[Category:Servitors]]
[[sn:Daemonurgy]][[Category:Desire synthesis]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Daemonurgy]][[Category:Inner Dialogue]]
[[sn:Daemonurgy]]
[[Category:Pages]]
